meta.title: Elektro Becker GmbH | Electrician in Gelsenkirchen
meta.description: Master electrician for installation, repair, smart home and solar in Gelsenkirchen. 20+ years experience. 24/7 emergency service.

hero.headline: Your trusted electrician — fast, clean, affordable
hero.subline: From new installations to emergency repairs: we handle all electrical work professionally and on time.

services.title: What we do for you
services.subtitle: From simple repairs to full smart home upgrades — we are your go-to electrical contractor.
services.service1Desc: New construction, renovation and expansion of electrical systems for residential and commercial.
services.service2Desc: Fast fault diagnosis and emergency help for short circuits, outages or defective devices.
services.service3Desc: KNX, Loxone, Philips Hue and Alexa integration for your intelligent home.
services.service4Desc: Solar panels, battery storage and EV charger — turnkey from a single source.
services.service5Desc: Always reachable — including weekends and holidays. We'll be with you within 60 minutes.
services.service6Desc: Wallbox installation for home and commercial. All major manufacturers supported.

about.title: The Becker family — your electrician for 20 years
about.description: As an owner-operated master electrician from Gelsenkirchen, we know the region and its requirements. Quality, punctuality and fair prices are not promises — they are our everyday standard.
about.feature1Desc: No hidden costs — you receive a transparent quote before work begins.
about.feature2Desc: Exclusively our own qualified professionals. No subcontractors.
about.feature3Desc: We provide a written work guarantee on all our services.

process.title: From inquiry to completion in 4 steps
process.subtitle: Simple, transparent and without surprises.
process.step1Desc: Fill out our form or call us — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
process.step2Desc: Free inspection at your home or business.
process.step3Desc: Transparent cost breakdown with no hidden fees.
process.step4Desc: Clean, on time and inspected — with work guarantee and acceptance report.
